database_specific_examples.overview: Complete DSL configuration examples for common databases. Use these as references when creating connectors for specific database systems.

oracle_example.notes: Oracle JDBC driver may need to be downloaded manually from Oracle website if not available in Maven Central. Place in lib/ directory.

guideline.title: Selecting the Right Example
guideline.description: Choose the example that matches your target database. If your database is not listed, find the closest match and adapt the configuration.

guideline.title: Adapting Examples
guideline.description: When adapting an example for a similar database: 1. Update connector_name and connector_label 2. Change driver_class_name to match your database 3. Adjust url_template for your database's URL format 4. Update system_schemas list 5. Modify identifier_quote_char if different 6. Add/remove additional_properties as needed
